content: Marlin (IST-DASLab): highly optimized FP16xINT4 GPU matmul kernel, ~4x speedup at batch<=16. Sparse-Marlin adds 2:4 sparsity (~5.3x). Supported via GPTQModel/vLLM/ExLlamaV2. GPU-only CUDA kernel. NOT applicable to pure-Python CPU project, but the 'packed INT4 + group scales' storage layout is the reference format worth mirroring structurally.
